personalInfo.title: About Me
paragraphs: Not just software — operational systems. The kind that reduce friction, eliminate guesswork, and let people focus on what actually matters.

My background sits at the intersection of software engineering, SAP EWM, and logistics operations. I have spent years working on warehouse floors, inside ERP systems, and across development environments — which means I understand the problem before I write the first line of code.
I value precision over speed, ownership over excuses, and simplicity over complexity. If something can be automated, it should be. If a process is broken, it should be fixed — not worked around.
Currently studying Control & Automation Engineering to deepen my understanding of industrial systems and close the gap between software and the physical world.

experience.title: Experience
experience.intro: Software development, SAP logistics, and hands-on operations—a career built on engineering discipline and process improvement.

strauss.title: Logistics Process Lead
bullets: Manage inbound and outbound delivery processes across warehouse environments using SAP EWM and SAP WM.
Support integration of RF devices and operational workflows.
Train users and create process documentation and operational guides.
Contribute to warehouse automation initiatives and coordination between operations and IT.

besttuqay.title: Freelance Software Engineer
bullets: Develop and maintain modern web applications for client needs.
Translate requirements into practical, maintainable software solutions.
Deliver features with focus on usability, quality, and business value.

innovisec.title: Senior Software Developer
bullets: Built and maintained applications using Node.js, React, Angular, .NET, and React Native.
Implemented real-time solutions and serverless services to improve product performance.
Collaborated across development and DevOps workflows to support production delivery.
Contributed to R&D projects with focus on reliability, scalability, and user experience.

strauss_tech.title: Technical Support Specialist
bullets: Supported users across SAP, Active Directory, and internal systems.
Improved operational efficiency through support documentation and process assistance.
Helped maintain stable warehouse-related support processes.

qualitest.title: QA Automation and Manual Junior Tester
bullets: Performed automated and manual testing for Microsoft security-related products.
Built and configured complex test environments.
Worked with developers to validate fixes and improve software quality.

atid.description: Currently pursuing engineering studies with electrical licensing track.

ort.description: Graduated with honors, focused on software engineering and development.

skills.title: Skills & Competencies
skills.intro: Grouped by domain, engineering stack, and infrastructure.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.intro: Problem, solution, and measurable outcome—not just technology lists.

cvPortfolio.title: CV Portfolio — jawdat-dev.online
cvPortfolio.problem: Needed a credible way to present software, SAP, and logistics experience in one place.
cvPortfolio.solution: Multilingual React portfolio with i18n, RTL, CV downloads, and focused domain positioning.
cvPortfolio.outcome: Live portfolio that communicates the software + SAP + operations symmetry.

ipresent.title: iPresent - Digital Signage System
ipresent.problem: Multi-location signage relied on manual, inconsistent content updates.
ipresent.solution: WPF system for scheduled, multi-screen delivery with real-time updates.
ipresent.outcome: Reliable content communication across locations without per-screen manual work.

imanage.title: iManage - Small Business ERP System
imanage.problem: Inventory, sales, and accounting ran across fragmented spreadsheets and disconnected tools.
imanage.solution: .NET Core + React ERP unifying CRM, inventory, accounting, and reporting.
imanage.outcome: Centralized fragmented business workflows into a single operational system.

gofresh.title: GoFresh - Drinks Shop Menu App
gofresh.description: A digital menu application for a drinks shop built with serverless architecture. Features include dynamic menu management with Sanity.io integration, like functionality for menu items, real-time menu updates, and responsive design for customers to browse drinks and place orders.

asend.title: ASend - Automated Congratulations Cards
asend.description: An automated congratulations card system built with Supabase for seamless card generation and customization. Features include automated card creation, customizable templates, real-time database management, and user-friendly interface for creating personalized congratulatory messages.

myShop.title: myShop - Ticket Management System
myShop.problem: Legacy ticketing caused data lag between cloud services and local terminals.
myShop.solution: Migrated to React, React Native, Deno, Docker, and Supabase.
myShop.outcome: Synchronized cloud and local data, reducing lag and improving terminal uptime.

dup_py.title: Dup_py - Duplicate File Finder
dup_py.problem: Duplicate files consumed disk space with no safe cross-platform cleanup option.
dup_py.solution: Open-source SHA1-based duplicate finder for Linux and Windows.
dup_py.outcome: Recoverable disk space with user-controlled, safer cleanup.
